text:
Charts spinning indefinitely on both browsers points to a backend issue rather than your setup. What app version are you on — you can find it in settings or the about page?

In the meantime, try the web app at novig.com if you haven't already; that'll tell us if it's isolated to the mobile app or broader.

Once you send the version number, I'll loop in engineering to investigate what's happening on our end. They'll follow up once they've identified it.

Novig Support
